_publications._publicationTitle: Graph complexity analysis identifies an ETV5 tumor-specific network in human and murine low-grade glioma.

_contextSnippet: Etv5 2.74 3.54 2.40 2.07... in at least three out of the four optic glioma models, there is increased expression of the eight validated Etv5 target genes
details: Shows 2.40-fold increased Etv5 expression and differential expression of validated Etv5 target genes
